steps.description: Inspect dirty state and existing workflow authority.
Keep ReducedUiControls with default scale, visible loading/thinking animation, raster threads at 2, and smooth scrolling disabled.
Add repo-owned subagent delegate-or-waive policy and checker coverage.
Remove inactive Documents\Codex trusted-project pollution and refresh provenance reports.
Generate L2 evidence artifacts and run gate/checker commands.
Split commits, push newwindow, and verify clean upstream match.
